name: lexnova-runtime-api
description: Lex Nova HQ Cloud Run runtime API for server-side model execution.

scripts.check: npm run check:core && npm run check:sources && npm run check:diligence && npm run check:live && npm run check:scripts && npm run check:tests

src/report-renderer/legalExposureReportFrontSections.js && node --check src/report-renderer/legalExposureReportBackSections.js && node --check src/report-renderer/legalExposureReportRendererV2.js &&
